name: SAFETY SENTRY: Context-Aware Human Intervention via EXECUTE-ASK-REFUSE Routing
summary: arXiv:2607.13594v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM agents act on real-world environments through tool calls, and a single misjudged action can cause irreversible harm. The standard safeguard is a...
description: arXiv:2607.13594v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM agents act on real-world environments through tool calls, and a single misjudged action can cause irreversible harm. The standard safeguard is a guard model that labels each proposed action as safe or unsafe, but this binary view conflates two distinct decisions: whether the action is harmful in itself, and whether it is appropriate given the...
author: Tianyu Chen, Chujia Hu, Wenjie Wang
